member.name: P:nxm.setup.use.data.setup_task.update_provider
member.summary: package content (and possibly package-info) provider code

member.name: M:nxm.setup.use.engine.setup.run(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,System.String,System.Func{System.String,nxm.setup.use.provider.iupdate_package_provider})
member.summary: execute task stored in given file

member.name: M:nxm.setup.use.engine.setup.run(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,nxm.setup.use.data.setup_task,System.Func{System.String,nxm.setup.use.provider.iupdate_package_provider})
member.summary: execute task defined in method argument

member.name: M:nxm.setup.use.engine.setup._get_package_stream(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,nxm.setup.use.data.setup_task)
member.summary: provides package stream for given package id may use cache or download from provider

member.name: M:nxm.setup.use.engine.setup._compose_package_cache_path(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: compose package file path in cache

member.name: M:nxm.setup.use.engine.setup_action_utils.create_files_backup(nxm.setup.use.engine.setup_execution_context)
member.summary: creates backup of files in directories given in FILESETS property of task

member.name: M:nxm.setup.use.engine.setup_action_utils.copy_files_to_targets(nxm.setup.use.engine.setup_execution_context)
member.summary: copy files from package to target directories according to paths and sets given in task's parameters

member.name: M:nxm.setup.use.engine.setup_action_utils.store_installed_package_info(nxm.setup.use.engine.setup_execution_context)
member.summary: store installed package info in 'main' target directory

member.name: T:nxm.setup.use.engine.fpUSEAction
member.summary: top level USE action handler, callable by USE

member.name: T:nxm.setup.use.engine.stock_setup_action
member.summary: stock update-service-engine actions and its catalogue

member.name: M:nxm.setup.use.engine.stock_setup_action.standard_fileset_update(nxm.setup.use.engine.setup_execution_context,nxm.system.core.data.types.basic._variant_set_)
member.summary: standard update procedure copying/installing files from package it can stop/start services being updated and create backup of files installed

member.name: T:nxm.setup.use.provider.update_package_provider_http_client
member.summary: update package provider client on plain HTTP

member.name: M:nxm.setup.use.provider.iupdate_package_provider.get_package(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: get package content for given channel and package id

member.name: T:nxm.setup.uss.data.update_package_info
member.summary: update service package info DTO contains information about available package (suitable to be JSOned)

member.name: T:nxm.setup.uss.data.update_package_info_set
member.summary: set of update service package info DTOs (suitable to be JSOned)

member.name: T:nxm.setup.uss.just_copy_files_uss
member.summary: simple update service subscriber which directs to copy package files to target directory

member.name: M:nxm.setup.uss.uss_hub.get_updatable_targets(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context)
member.summary: enumerate all possible updatable targets from all registered subscribers. note: each subscriber can list many targets (multiple instances handled same way)

member.name: P:nxm.setup.uss.iupdate_service_subscriber.id
member.summary: subscriber ID (unique among other subscribers in same uss-hub

member.name: M:nxm.setup.uss.iupdate_service_subscriber.get_updatable_targets(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,nxm.setup.usc.provider.iupdate_info_provider)
member.summary: enumerate all possible updatable targets - the subscriber can list many targets (multiple instances handled same way)

member.name: M:nxm.setup.uss.uss_utils.fill_run_after_from_current_process(nxm.setup.use.data.setup_task)
member.summary: fill run-after process from current command line (suitable to 'restart me' operation)

member.name: M:nxm.setup.uss.uss_utils.load_installed_package_info(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: read installed package info from given ('target') directory for given channel

member.name: M:nxm.setup.uss.uss_utils.get_updatable_targets_for_single_channel_with_ipi(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,System.String,nxm.setup.usc.provider.iupdate_info_provider,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: returns collection of updatable targets from single update-channel using installed-package-info

member.name: T:nxm.setup.uss.activator.use_activator
member.summary: prepares update-service task and starts engine (used at subscriber side)

member.name: M:nxm.setup.uss.activator.use_activator.prepare_use(nxm.system.execution.context.icall_context,System.Func{System.String,nxm.setup.use.provider.iupdate_package_provider},System.String,System.String)
member.summary: downloads (into setup\bin directory) update-service-engine required by a given task

member.name: T:nxm.setup.usc.provider.update_info_provider_http_client
member.summary: update info provider client working over plain HTTP

member.name: M:nxm.setup.utils.setup_utils.is_windows_service(System.String)
member.summary: check if exists windows service with matching name

member.name: M:nxm.setup.utils.setup_utils.select_windows_services(System.String)
member.summary: select windows services with matching wildcard name

member.name: M:nxm.setup.utils.setup_utils.stop_windows_service(System.String)
member.summary: tries to stop given windows service. returns true if the service has already been stopped (state before the action)

member.name: M:nxm.setup.utils.setup_utils.stop_processes(nxm.setup.use.engine.setup_execution_context,System.String)
member.summary: stop processes matching given name wildcard
